aZ?-
z$Newton-CG trust-region optimization.
_minimize_trust_region
BaseQuadraticSubproblem
    Minimization of scalar function of one or more variables using
    the Newton conjugate gradient trust-region algorithm.
    Options
    -------
    initial_trust_radius : float
        Initial trust-region radius.
    max_trust_radius : float
        Maximum value of the trust-region radius. No steps that are longer
        than this value will be proposed.
    eta : float
        Trust region related acceptance stringency for proposed steps.
    gtol : float
        Gradient norm must be less than `gtol` before successful
        termination.
    Nz<Jacobian is required for Newton-CG trust-region minimizationzdEither the Hessian or the Hessian-vector product is required for Newton-CG trust-region minimization)
args
hess
hesspZ
subproblem)
ValueErrorr
CGSteihaugSubproblem)
funZ
trust_region_optionsr
E/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/scipy/optimize/_trustregion_ncg.py
_minimize_trust_ncg
z:Quadratic subproblem solved by a conjugate gradient methodc
}	|	d
        Solve the subproblem using a conjugate gradient method.
        Parameters
        ----------
        trust_radius : float
            We are allowed to wander only this far away from the origin.
        Returns
        -------
        p : ndarray
            The proposed step.
        hits_boundary : bool
            True if the proposed step is on the boundary of the trust region.
        Notes
        -----
        This is algorithm (7.2) of Nocedal and Wright 2nd edition.
        Only the function that computes the Hessian-vector product is required.
        The Hessian itself is not required, and the Hessian does
        not need to be positive semidefinite.
        g
zeros_liker
mathZ
sqrtZ
jac_magr	
dotZ
get_boundaries_intersections
scipyZ
linalgZ
norm)

trust_radiusZ
p_originZ	toleranceZ
hits_boundary
dBdZ
p_boundaryZ	r_squaredZ
alphaZ
z_nextZ
r_nextZ
r_next_squaredZ	beta_nextZ
d_nextr
solve,
CGSteihaugSubproblem.solveN)
